conflictOfInterest.details: Founding-stage operational conflict: the accountable principal github:VSBDev operated the authoring and packaging agents and also operated this formal academic-review subagent. This review is nevertheless a new role-isolated run with a unique run ID; it had no access to the authoring conversation, another review conclusion, or an adjudication draft. The conflict is disclosed rather than treated as verified independence.

evidenceChecked: candidate commit 9df98b58e534225725314047d88538235159bd88 identity, clean frozen worktree, and complete lessons/PREM-SCI-008-bias-threats-validity tree
lesson.json#PREM-SCI-008 identity, standard risk tier, objectives, scene order, outcome mapping, prerequisites, scope, authorship, and source-confidence state
site/data/premed-graph.json#topic-scientific-inquiry-bias and prerequisite nodes topic-scientific-inquiry-sampling-randomization and topic-scientific-inquiry-measurement-validity
content/01-find-the-missing-path.md#scene-find-path including diagnostic answers, scope, bias/random-error distinction, observer route, survivorship example, recovery, and source note

content/02-follow-the-evidence-pipeline.md#scene-evidence-pipeline including all six mechanisms, overlapping-category boundaries, direction cautions, funnel limits, five-part statement, and four source notes
content/03-audit-the-seedling-study.md#scene-seedling-audit including target estimand, randomization/scope boundary, denominator repair, observer uncertainty, reporting distinction, and checks

content/03-audit-the-seedling-study.md#survival-and-the-denominator independently recalculated as 72/90 = 80%, 49/70 = 70%, survivor-only difference = 10 percentage points, 72/100 = 72%, 49/100 = 49%, planned difference = 23 percentage points
content/04-practise-the-discriminations.md#scene-practice including pipeline retrieval, machine-survival direction, equal-loss mechanism comparison, six mixed cases, feedback, and source note

content/05-repair-and-transfer.md#scene-repair-transfer including fixed 2 mm calibration error, sample-size boundary, acoustic-classifier audit, denominator comparability, selective-reporting/publication distinction, recovery, and source note
content/06-demonstrate-mastery.md#scene-mastery including mastery boundary, remediation, synthesis, delayed retrieval, safe-use limits, and source note

claims.json#claim-bias-versus-random-error, claim-selection-mechanism, claim-information-misclassification, claim-observer-mechanism, claim-attrition-mechanism, claim-survivorship-filter, claim-publication-versus-reporting, and claim-funnel-limits

all same-scene claim/source-note chains: each named claim was traced to the complete union of its sourceIds in references.json, with scope and uncertainty checked against the learner-visible statement
references.json#source-bias-taxonomy and source-information-bias, checked through the permitted public PMC article routes at the recorded locators

references.json#source-selection-framework and source-misclassification-direction, checked through the permitted public PMC article routes for eligible-population selection and exceptions to direction heuristics

references.json#source-observer-systematic-review, source-attrition-reporting, and source-selection-toolkit, checked through the permitted public PMC article routes for masked assessment, outcome-related loss, differential survival, and sensitivity checks

references.json#source-publication-bias and source-outcome-reporting, checked through the permitted public PMC article routes for whole-study visibility, funnel-asymmetry alternatives/low power, and within-study selective reporting

assessment.json#item-map-six-biases, item-interpret-equal-attrition, item-distinguish-reporting-publication, and item-transfer-acoustic-archive with every key, acceptable response, common error, point total, and rubric criterion
glossary.json#all 16 term records, definitions, aliases, and scene mappings
diagrams/evidence-pipeline.diagram.json#diagram-evidence-pipeline nodes, directed edges, labels, and correspondence with the prose evidence path
ATTRIBUTION.md#original-synthesis, source-use, third-party-assets, source-access, and governance-state declarations relevant to academic provenance

findings.finding: The record lists "sampling variation" as an alias for "random error". Sampling variation is one source of random error, but random error also includes unpredictable measurement and other experimental variation; the directly checked information-bias source explicitly discusses random measurement error. Treating the narrower phrase as a synonym can blur the lesson's otherwise accurate distinction between sampling fluctuation and systematic measurement error.
findings.resolution: Remove "sampling variation" from aliases or recast it as a narrower example in the definition, such as "Random error includes sampling variation and unpredictable measurement variation."

findings.finding: The fictional seedling calculation and its model boundary are correct. The survivor-only comparison is 80% minus 70% = 10 percentage points, whereas the prespecified alive-and-healthy estimand is 72% minus 49% = 23 percentage points. The text correctly treats observed deaths in the composite outcome as a denominator/conditioning problem rather than unobserved attrition and leaves the unmasked-rating component's direction unresolved.

The candidate appropriately resists a scientifically false universal shortcut. The older taxonomy source presents a simplified toward-the-null rule for nondifferential dichotomous exposure misclassification, but the separately cited 2022 methodological review documents multiple exceptions. The claim, scenes, and assessments preserve the conditions-and-exceptions boundary and do not reward an unsupported direction guess.

The linear evidence-pipeline diagram is used as a timing heuristic rather than a claim that categories are mutually exclusive. The prose explicitly states that attrition, survivorship, and selection can overlap and requires the learner to name the filter and timing; this is academically defensible within the college-intro outcome and avoids label-only diagnosis.

limitations: Operational independence is limited by the disclosed founding-stage conflict: github:VSBDev operated both the authoring/packaging agents and this reviewer subagent, although this was a fresh role-isolated run without authoring or adjudication context.
The reviewer is an AI scientific-methods reviewer, not a credentialed human epidemiologist or biostatistician; the verdict is limited to the declared college-intro mechanism-detection scope.

Direct source verification used the public PMC article representations for all nine sources because every ledger record permitted agent access; no human-only or inaccessible source blocked judgment, but original study datasets and unpublished protocols were not independently reanalyzed.

The seedling, machine, acoustic, and protein cases are explicitly fictional, so review verified arithmetic, internal consistency, mechanism logic, and calibrated inference rather than empirical external validity of those invented cases.
This run did not perform learning-design, accessibility-and-rights, finalization, adjudication, GitHub-submission, quorum, or merge-readiness review.
